label: hate
rationale: 'Muslim shithole' - derogatory characterization of religious group

label: offensive
rationale: 'Ushenzi wawacha' - crude language but directed at individuals, not collective ethnic contempt

label: offensive
rationale: 'KUUA kwa maelfu wananchi' - violent political rhetoric targeting government, not ethnic group

label: hate
rationale: 'Wamunyoro hawezi hivi. A very selfish being' - collective attribution of selfishness to ethnic group

label: neither
rationale: Historical-political discussion of ethnic-bloc alliances, no attack on group

label: neither
rationale: Electoral arithmetic about tribal coalitions, no contempt expressed

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus must be very expensive' - collective attribution of greed/costliness to ethnic group

label: hate
rationale: 'people of Siaya are equally mad. Insane' - collective attribution of mental unfitness to regional-ethnic group

label: offensive
rationale: 'FRED MATIANGI maimed and killed' - accusation against named politician, mentions Muslims as victims not targets

label: neither
rationale: 'ODM will become a luo party' - party-ethnic analysis without group attack

label: hate
rationale: 'RADICAL MUSLIMS WILL KILL EVERY JEW' and 'SUBHUMAN PIECE OF SHIT' - violent rhetoric plus dehumanization

label: neither
rationale: Reports someone's call for ethnic-based firings, does not endorse the view

label: hate
rationale: 'high-ranking muslin brotherhood leader who infiltrated our govt to destroy us' - conspiracy targeting religious group

label: offensive
rationale: 'Ruto remains the enemy of kenyans... Ruto must go' - harsh political criticism of individual leader

label: offensive
rationale: 'STUPID. Kindiki isn't a Kikuyu' - personal insult in political debate

label: hate
rationale: 'mgikuyu erfu kumi ndio hasimuibie, mkamba mia mbili anyamaze, mluhyia alalelae' - stereotypes Kikuyu as thieves, Kamba as bribable, Luhyia as lazy

label: neither
rationale: 'LETENI HIZO PESA TUKULE ...LAKINI KURA NI KWA SIFUNA' - political statement about money and voting, no attack

label: hate
rationale: 'Luo ODM scavengers leaders' - dehumanizing term applied to ethnic group's political leadership

label: offensive
rationale: 'Walimwe hawa' - potentially violent language but target unidentifiable from context

label: neither
rationale: Historical claim about 2007-08 violence attribution, discussing past events not inciting

label: hate
rationale: 'Bukusu think leadership is their birthright and other luhyas are their subjects' - collective attribution of superiority complex

label: hate
rationale: 'Bukusus are officially the weakest' - collective negative characterization of ethnic sub-group

label: offensive
rationale: 'foolish tribal idiot' plus accusations - personal attack on individual politician

label: hate
rationale: 'Kenya si ya wakikuyu pekeako, what a tribal community' - collective attribution of tribalism to Kikuyu

label: offensive
rationale: 'illiterate Kamba political supremo' - insult aimed at named politician, not transferred to ethnic group
